description: 8 self-amplifying feedback loops from cascade_engine.py plus the cascade signal propagation map. These are the Earth system's positive feedback circuits — once triggered, they accelerate their own drivers.

feedback_loops.name: Ice-Albedo Positive Feedback
feedback_loops.mechanism: Ice loss darkens surface → increased absorption → accelerated melt
feedback_loops.rationale: Phase transition (ice→water) is matter (F08) containment failure

feedback_loops.name: Permafrost Methane Release Feedback
feedback_loops.mechanism: Thaw releases CO₂ and CH₄ → warming → further thaw
feedback_loops.rationale: Methane release is a chemical reaction (F13) — fire transforming stored carbon

feedback_loops.name: Amazon Dieback Feedback
feedback_loops.mechanism: Dieback → CO₂ release + albedo change → warming → forest loss
feedback_loops.rationale: Life (F04) system collapse at collective scope — network death cascade

feedback_loops.name: AMOC-SST Feedback Loop
feedback_loops.mechanism: Weakening circulation → N Atlantic cooling → atmospheric redistribution → feedback
feedback_loops.rationale: Circulation is flow (F02) mediation between ocean and atmosphere — OCTA balance failure

feedback_loops.name: Stratification-Productivity Feedback
feedback_loops.mechanism: Stratification → reduced nutrient upwelling → CO₂ uptake limitation → warming
feedback_loops.rationale: Nutrient network (F12) disconnection at the ocean-biosphere interface

feedback_loops.name: Rotation-Coriolis Coupling Feedback
feedback_loops.mechanism: LOD change → spin-orbit perturbation → Coriolis + B-field shift → circulation change
feedback_loops.rationale: Earth-Cosmos (F07) scale — planetary rotation coupling to magnetic field is cosmic-scale orientation

feedback_loops.name: Volcanic-Deglaciation Feedback
feedback_loops.mechanism: Ice removal → crustal unloading → volcanic outgassing → warming → ice loss
feedback_loops.rationale: Engineering (F11) failure — crustal structural unloading is a load-bearing collapse

feedback_loops.name: Magnomechanical-EM Coupling Feedback
feedback_loops.mechanism: EM-induced strain → crustal magnetic stress → acoustic emissions → piezomagnetic coupling
feedback_loops.rationale: Resonance (F01) — piezomagnetic coupling IS resonant energy transfer between EM and mechanical domains

cascade_map.description: Signal propagation network — which layers influence which
